narrative:
Precinct Sylvania Township H (precinct in Lucas County) has 948 registered voters, with 50.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.1%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.5 percentage points.
